title: NZ School Holidays Travel Tips — How to Beat the Crowds and Save Money
meta_desc: Discover expert tips for travelling NZ during school holidays, save up to $500 on accommodation
intro: Travelling during NZ school holidays can be expensive, with prices soaring up to 30% higher than off-peak periods. However, with some planning and insider knowledge, you can beat the crowds and save money. For example, booking a campsite at Lake Tekapo's Alpine Village costs $45 per night during peak season, compared to $25 during off-peak periods.

sections.heading: Plan Ahead to Save
sections.body: Booking your accommodation and activities well in advance can help you save up to 20% on costs. For instance, booking a bach in Wanaka through Bookabach 6 months in advance can cost $1,200 per week, compared to $1,500 if booked 2 months in advance. Additionally, consider booking a campervan, which can be a cost-effective option, with prices starting from $100 per day.

sections.heading: Avoid Popular Destinations
list: Consider visiting less popular destinations, such as the Whanganui National Park, which is a 3-hour drive from Wellington
The Catlins, located on the South Island's eastern coast, offers stunning scenery and outdoor activities, with a 2.5-hour drive from Invercargill
The Waikato region, with its scenic landscapes and cultural attractions, is a 2-hour drive from Auckland

sections.heading: Make the Most of Free Activities
sections.body: New Zealand offers a wide range of free activities, such as visiting the stunning beaches, going for a hike, or exploring the local markets. For example, the Wellington waterfront is a great place to visit, with its scenic views, street performers, and free activities for kids. You can also visit the Auckland Art Gallery Toi o Tāmaki, which offers free admission to its collection galleries.

cta.text: Get started with our NZ Family Travel Budget Calculator

sections.heading: Book a Campervan
sections.body: Campervans are a great way to travel around New Zealand, offering flexibility and cost-effectiveness. You can rent a campervan from companies like Jucy or Britz, with prices starting from $100 per day. Consider visiting our campervans page for more information and to book your campervan.

sections.heading: Insider Tips
list: Consider travelling during the shoulder season, which falls in April to May and September to November, for lower prices and fewer crowds
Look for package deals that include accommodation, activities, and car rentals, which can offer significant savings
Book your activities and attractions in advance to avoid sold-out situations and long wait times

sections.heading: Explore Our Destinations
sections.body: New Zealand has a wide range of destinations to explore, from the scenic landscapes of the South Island to the cultural attractions of the North Island. Consider visiting our destinations page for more information and to plan your trip.
